creator: don_oles@able.com.ua
text:
I've created usb flash drive with FreeBSD system using nanobsd script.

Everything works well except that after the BIOS starts booting and
before I see first messages from BTX loader approximately one minute
passes with blank screen without doing anything. It was tested on several
different motherboards, new ones and old ones.
That is a problem. It has to start booting fast.

How-To-Repeat: Just boot FreeBSD from USB flash drive.
